subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. I’d be happy to help set up a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please let me know your preferred time within the window.

I’m not able to share internal contact details or direct lines. For the appropriate public contact information, please refer to our public website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
